creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Max Brazhnikov from comment #2)

SciLab should also be updated. I couldn't make 6.0.1 build yet due to this bug in SciLab's configure process: https://bugzilla.scilab.org/show_bug.cgi?id=15906

All these Java ports shouldn't be updated before SciLab builds. I didn't yet verify other depending ports.


Yuri
